children.heading: Reduction in certain preference items, etc.
children.label: a Reduction in certain preference items, etc.
A
children.text: the amount which would be treated as ordinary income if such property was section 1245 property, over

children.label: B
children.text: the amount treated as ordinary income under section 1250 (determined without regard to this paragraph),

children.label: A
children.text: the amount of the deduction allowable under section 613 for the taxable year (determined without regard to this paragraph), over

children.label: B
children.text: the adjusted basis of the property at the close of the taxable year (determined without regard to the depletion deduction for the taxable year).

children.heading: Certain financial institution preference items
children.label: 3 Certain financial institution preference items
children.text: The amount allowable as a deduction under this chapter (determined without regard to this section) with respect to any financial institution preference item shall be reduced by 20 percent.

children.heading: Amortization of pollution control facilities
children.label: 4 Amortization of pollution control facilities
children.text: If an election is made under section 169 with respect to any certified pollution control facility, the amortizable basis of such facility for purposes of such section shall be reduced by 20 percent.

children.heading: Special rules for treatment of intangible drilling costs and mineral exploration and development costs
children.label: b Special rules for treatment of intangible drilling costs and mineral exploration and development costs
A
children.text: under section 263(c) in the case of an integrated oil company, or

children.label: B
children.text: under section 616(a) or 617(a),

children.heading: Amortization of amounts not allowable as deductions under paragraph (1)
children.label: 2 Amortization of amounts not allowable as deductions under paragraph (1)
children.text: The amount not allowable as a deduction under section 263(c), 616(a), or 617(a) (as the case may be) for any taxable year by reason of paragraph (1) shall be allowable as a deduction ratably over the 60-month period beginning with the month in which the costs are paid or incurred.

children.heading: Dispositions
children.label: 3 Dispositions
children.text: For purposes of section 1254, any deduction under paragraph (2) shall be treated as a deduction allowable under section 263(c), 616(a), or 617(a) (whichever is appropriate).

children.heading: Integrated oil company defined
children.label: 4 Integrated oil company defined
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “integrated oil company” means, with respect to any taxable year, any producer of crude oil to whom subsection (c) of section 613A does not apply by reason of paragraph (2) or (4) of section 613A(d).

children.heading: Coordination with cost depletion
children.label: 5 Coordination with cost depletion
children.text: The portion of the adjusted basis of any property which is attributable to amounts to which paragraph (1) applied shall not be taken into account for purposes of determining depletion under section 611.

children.heading: Special rules relating to pollution control facilities
children.label: c Special rules relating to pollution control facilities

children.heading: Accelerated cost recovery deduction
children.label: 1 Accelerated cost recovery deduction
children.text: Section 168 shall apply with respect to that portion of the basis of any property not taken into account under section 169 by reason of subsection (a)(4).

children.heading: 1250 Recapture
children.label: 2 1250 Recapture
children.text: Subsection (a)(1) shall not apply to any section 1250 property which is part of a certified pollution control facility (within the meaning of section 169(d)(1)) with respect to which an election under section 169 was made.

children.heading: Special rule for real estate investment trusts
children.label: d Special rule for real estate investment trusts
children.text: In the case of a real estate investment trust (as defined in section 856), the difference between the amounts described in subparagraphs (A) and (B) of subsection (a)(1) shall be reduced to the extent that a capital gain dividend (as defined in section 857(b)(3)(C), applied without regard to this section) is treated as paid out of such difference. Any capital gain dividend treated as having been paid out of such difference to a shareholder which is an applicable corporation retains its character in the hands of the shareholder as gain from the disposition of section 1250 property for purposes of applying subsection (a)(1) to such shareholder.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Interest on debt to carry tax-exempt obligations acquired after , and beforeDecember 31, 1982August 8, 1986
children.label: B Interest on debt to carry tax-exempt obligations acquired after , and beforeDecember 31, 1982August 8, 1986

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: In the case of a financial institution which is a bank (as defined in section 585(a)(2)), the amount of interest on indebtedness incurred or continued to purchase or carry obligations acquired after , and before , the interest on which is exempt from taxes for the taxable year, to the extent that a deduction would (but for this paragraph or section 265(b)) be allowable with respect to such interest for such taxable year.December 31, 1982August 8, 1986

children.heading: Determination of interest allocable to indebtedness on tax-exempt obligations
children.label: ii Determination of interest allocable to indebtedness on tax-exempt obligations
I
children.text: the taxpayer’s average adjusted basis (within the meaning of section 1016) of obligations described in clause (i), bears to

children.label: II
children.text: such average adjusted basis for all assets of the taxpayer.

children.heading: Interest
children.label: iii Interest
children.text: For purposes of this subparagraph, the term “interest” includes amounts (whether or not designated as interest) paid in respect of deposits, investment certificates, or withdrawable or repurchasable shares.

children.heading: Application of subparagraph to certain obligations issued afterAugust 7, 1986
children.label: iv Application of subparagraph to certain obligations issued afterAugust 7, 1986

children.heading: Section 1245 and 1250 property
children.label: 2 Section 1245 and 1250 property
children.text: The terms “section 1245 property” and “section 1250 property” have the meanings given such terms by sections 1245(a)(3) and 1250(c), respectively.
